name: Close Discovery
description: An intimate shot of a figure encountering something momentous, framed tight on the face and hands.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A single figure in tight framing, eyes wide at something just beyond the edge of frame, hands half-raised in instinct
{setting}. Close on a discoverer's face and reaching hands, every micro-expression of wonder and trepidation visible
{setting}. Tight shot of figures clustered around a find, their faces filling the frame with raw, unguarded reactions

1: {subject}, center frame, facing forward and slightly down, filling most of the frame
2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right and slightly downward, closer to camera
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left and slightly downward, slightly behind in depth
3: {subject}, left side of frame, facing right, nearest to camera and largest
{subject}, center frame, facing forward and down, mid-depth
{subject}, right side of frame, facing left, furthest from camera

background_pool: soft-focus cavern walls glistening with moisture, scattered warm reflected light pooling on damp surfaces, stalactites blurring into amber bokeh
blurred ancient stone covered in moss and carved symbols, dappled green light filtering from above, intricate details melting into soft shapes
out-of-focus interior of a lost chamber, floating dust particles catching golden light, dark stone edges dissolving into warm haze
indistinct overgrown ruin behind the figure, vines and roots soft green smears, broken masonry reduced to gentle color blocks
action_pool: one hand reaching forward, fingers spread wide, arm fully extended toward something unseen
both hands cupped carefully as if cradling something fragile, palms up, elbows tucked near the ribs
leaning the torso slightly forward, neck extended, eyes narrowed in focus
head tilted back, eyes wide, lips parted in a sharp intake of breath
fingers tracing delicate lines in the air just above something, hand steady, wrist poised
pulling both hands close to the chest, shoulders drawn up, fingers curled loosely
one hand hovering midair near the face, index finger extended, the other hand balled at the side
turning the head slowly to the side, brow furrowed, one hand frozen mid-gesture near the shoulder
pressing a palm flat against own chest, fingers splayed over the sternum, head bowed slightly
reaching up to adjust a collar or strap near the neck, fingers gripping, gaze locked downward
